name: DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc.
description: DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. is a leading cloud computing platform that simplifies cloud infrastructure for developers, start-ups, and small-to-medium-sized businesses (SMBs). The company provides highly reliable, on-demand cloud services, including compute, storage, networking, and managed databases, enabling businesses to deploy, manage, and scale applications quickly and cost-effectively. With its user-friendly interface, transparent pricing, and robust developer community resources, DigitalOcean empowers millions of users worldwide to build and grow their digital products without the complexity of traditional cloud providers.
